allow: Bash(node -e "console.log\('JavaScript syntax check...'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); const app = fs.readFileSync\('./js/app.js', 'utf-8'\); const i18n = fs.readFileSync\('./js/i18n.js', 'utf-8'\); console.log\('✓ app.js loaded'\); console.log\('✓ i18n.js loaded'\); if\(app.includes\('getTotalTimeSpent'\)\) console.log\('✓ Time tracking implemented'\); if\(app.includes\('loadComments'\)\) console.log\('✓ Comments implemented'\); if\(app.includes\('recommendedSection'\)\) console.log\('✓ Recommendations implemented'\); if\(app.includes\('highlightText'\)\) console.log\('✓ Search highlighting implemented'\); if\(app.includes\('showShortcutsModal'\)\) console.log\('✓ Keyboard shortcuts implemented'\); if\(app.includes\('exportTranscript'\)\) console.log\('✓ Transcript export implemented'\);")
